title: Classes, Private State, Inheritance, and Composition · Behavior Brief: Private Static
summary: Build maintainable scheduling components with explicit invariants and replaceable policies. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js private static increment in a policy-driven scheduling component library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use private fields, static fields, and static blocks without confusing instance and constructor state.
Explain classes as prototype-based constructs with strict bodies, constructors, methods, and fields.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
